items.headline: Major whiskey producer closes historic distillery amid slowdown
items.summary: Declining sales have prompted spirits distillers to close operations as they address economic conditions during an industry slowdown. items.headline: Does Brown-Forman’s Mixed FY26 Results And Flat FY27 Outlook Alter The Bull Case For BF.B?
items.summary: In early June 2026, Brown-Forman reported fiscal fourth-quarter 2026 results showing net sales of US$912 million and full-year sales of US$3.93 billion, with earnings per share from continuing operations easing to US$0.12 for the quarter and US$1.53 for the year, while also affirming a regular quarterly dividend of US$0.2310 per share.
